action.reasoning: Observation: Baseline pipeline works. 3 epochs gave rmse_z500=521.5 (eval). ~41s/epoch with 2.37M params. Loss was still decreasing. Analysis: We have ~4.9h budget and 27 iterations. Need to scale up: more epochs, larger model. Let me train a bigger model (hidden=192, n_blocks=12) for ~25 epochs. Should take ~25*60s = ~25min. Decision: Train longer with larger model.
action.command: EPOCHS=25 BS=64 LR=5e-4 HIDDEN=192 NBLOCKS=12 python train.py
